{
    "cefr_level": "B2",
    "level_basis": {
        "textinspector_level_raw": null,
        "flesch_kincaid": null,
        "rule_notes": "Holistic estimate based on expert annotation and text analysis."
    },
    "communicative_task_achievement": "Yes",
    "communicative_task_notes": [
        "Response addresses the prompt (answer post + tips).",
        "Sentence count meets the requirement (approx. 10 sentences).",
        "Tone is appropriate for a student chat context."
    ],
    "grammar_score": 0.72,
    "corrections": [
        "decition -> decision (Spelling; A2; Low)",
        "tips how -> tips on how (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
        "options how -> options for how (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
        "each my day -> each of my days (Word order; B1; Medium)",
        "other's works -> others' work (Grammar; B2; Medium)",
        "very important thing -> a very important thing (Grammar; A2; Low)"
    ],
    "errors_by_category": {
        "Lexis": [],
        "Grammar": [
            {
                "excerpt": "tips how",
                "correction": "tips on how",
                "comment": "Preposition missing after noun.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B1"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "options how",
                "correction": "options for how",
                "comment": "Preposition missing after noun.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B1"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "rest within them",
                "correction": "rest during them",
                "comment": "Preposition choice for time periods.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B1"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "other's works",
                "correction": "others' work",
                "comment": "Possessive plural and uncountable noun usage.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "very important thing",
                "correction": "a very important thing",
                "comment": "Missing article before singular countable noun.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Punctuation": [
            {
                "excerpt": "studying,",
                "correction": "studying.",
                "comment": "Comma splice or fragment boundary issue.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "Firstly ",
                "correction": "Firstly,",
                "comment": "Missing comma after introductory adverb.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Word order": [
            {
                "excerpt": "each my day",
                "correction": "each of my days",
                "comment": "Determiner order error.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B1"
            }
        ],
        "Sentence structure": [],
        "Text organization": [],
        "Discourse markers": [],
        "Rhetorical features": [],
        "Register": [],
        "Incomprehensibility": []
    },
    "strengths": [
        {
            "item": "However",
            "cefr_level": "B2",
            "category": "Discourse marker",
            "note": "Effective contrast marker used multiple times."
        },
        {
            "item": "For example",
            "cefr_level": "B1",
            "category": "Discourse marker",
            "note": "Correctly introduces illustration."
        },
        {
            "item": "abuse",
            "cefr_level": "B2",
            "category": "Lexical choice",
            "note": "Precise verb choice in context of help."
        },
        {
            "item": "Actually, I think it's not bad at all.",
            "cefr_level": "B2",
            "category": "Rhetorical feature",
            "note": "Softens disagreement politely."
        }
    ],
    "feedback": "Level B2: The text demonstrates independent control of the task with good coherence and appropriate discourse markers. Vocabulary is functional and occasionally precise ('abuse', 'overload'). However, persistent errors in prepositions, articles, and word order prevent a higher score. The meaning is clear despite these slips.",
    "next_steps": [
        "Review prepositions following nouns (tips on, options for).",
        "Practice article usage with singular countable nouns.",
        "Focus on possessive plural forms (others' vs other's).",
        "Maintain the good use of discourse markers while polishing sentence boundaries."
    ]
}

{
    "cefr_level": "A2",
    "level_basis": {
        "textinspector_level_raw": null,
        "flesch_kincaid": null,
        "rule_notes": "No external indicators provided; holistic estimate from error density and vocabulary range."

    "communicative_task_achievement": "Partial",
    "communicative_task_notes": [
        "Task requires 10 sentences; text meets length requirement.",
        "Task requires tips; text provides 4 tips.",
        "Some tips are unclear or inappropriate (e.g., copying solutions)."
    ],
    "grammar_score": 0.40,
    "corrections": [
        "It is easily -> It is easy (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
        "pass all exam -> pass all exams (Grammar; A2; Low)",
        "for became diffiecult study easilier -> to make difficult study easier (Sentence structure/Spelling; A2; High)",
        "rewrite solution -> copy solutions (Lexical choice; B1; Medium)",
        "really work -> really works (Grammar; A2; Low)",
        "solve spend -> spend less time (Lexical choice; A2; High)",
        "traning -> training (Spelling; A1; Low)",
        "Do homework after getting -> Do homework after class (Incomprehensibility; A2; High)",
        "if you sleep in first iteration -> if you sleep well (Incomprehensibility; A2; High)",
        "esalier -> easier (Spelling; A1; Low)"
    ],
    "errors_by_category": {
        "Lexis": [
            {
                "excerpt": "rewrite solution",
                "correction": "copy solutions",
                "comment": "Inappropriate advice; lexical choice error.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "B1"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "solve spend",
                "correction": "spend less time",
                "comment": "Confused verb usage.",
                "impact": "High",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Grammar": [
            {
                "excerpt": "It is easily",
                "correction": "It is easy",
                "comment": "Adverb used as adjective.",
                "impact": "Medium",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "pass all exam",
                "correction": "pass all exams",
                "comment": "Pluralization error.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "really work",
                "correction": "really works",
                "comment": "Subject-verb agreement.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ],
        "Spelling": [
            {
                "excerpt": "traning",
                "correction": "training",
                "comment": "Spelling error.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A1"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "esalier",
                "correction": "easier",
                "comment": "Spelling error.",
                "impact": "Low",
                "cefr_threshold": "A1"
            }
        ],
        "Incomprehensibility": [
            {
                "excerpt": "Do homework after getting",
                "correction": "Do homework after class",
                "comment": "Meaning unclear.",
                "impact": "High",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            },
            {
                "excerpt": "if you sleep in first iteration",
                "correction": "if you sleep well",
                "comment": "Meaning unclear; jargon misuse.",
                "impact": "High",
                "cefr_threshold": "A2"
            }
        ]
    },
    "strengths": [
        {
            "item": "Tip number one... Tip number four",
            "cefr_level": "B1",
            "category": "Text organization",
            "note": "Clear structure with numbered tips."
        },
        {
            "item": "for example",
            "cefr_level": "A2",
            "category": "Discourse markers",
            "note": "Used correctly to introduce examples."
        }
    ],
    "feedback": "Level A2: The text attempts to fulfill the task with a clear structure (numbered tips), but frequent grammar errors, spelling mistakes, and unclear phrasing ('first iteration', 'after getting') significantly hinder communication. Vocabulary is basic. The advice to 'rewrite solution' is also problematic content-wise.",
    "next_steps": [
        "Review basic grammar rules (subject-verb agreement, adjectives vs adverbs).",
        "Proofread for spelling errors before submitting.",
        "Ensure advice is clear and appropriate (avoid suggesting copying work).",
        "Practice writing complete, clear sentences without jargon misuse."
    ]
}
